title: presidio-hardened-x402 audit-log entry
description: One line of the HMAC-chained, fsync-durable JSON-L pre-execution decision log emitted by presidio_x402.audit_log.AuditLog. Each entry records the agent's decision before a payment is signed and chains to the previous entry via prev_entry_hmac. The four action-ref-v1 preimage fields are derived from this entry (see presidio-audit-entry -> action_ref mapping in README.md).

timestamp.description: Decision time. Emitted via datetime.isoformat() on a UTC-aware value: microsecond precision with a numeric +00:00 offset (e.g. 2026-06-14T21:23:27.890123+00:00). NOTE: action-ref-v1 requires RFC 3339 with exactly 3 fractional digits and a literal Z, so this value MUST be normalized before it enters the action_ref preimage.

event_type.description: The pre-execution control outcome (the agent's decision), NOT a post-settlement action label. Known values: PAYMENT_ALLOWED, PII_REDACTED, PII_BLOCKED, WALLET_BLOCKED, POLICY_BLOCKED, REPLAY_BLOCKED, MPA_BLOCKED, PAYMENT_ERROR. Open list — additive.

resource_url.description: Post-redaction resource URL (PII in the URL is already masked when event_type is PII_REDACTED).

amount_usd.description: Advertised payment amount in USD as evaluated by the policy engine.

network.description: Settlement network label (e.g. base). May be empty.

agent_id.description: Stable identifier for the terminal executing agent. Optional; null when not configured. Maps verbatim to the action-ref-v1 agent_id preimage field.

outcome.description: Whether the decision permitted the payment to proceed to signing.

pii_entities_found.description: Presidio entity types detected in the payment metadata (e.g. EMAIL_ADDRESS, US_SSN). Empty when none.

policy_limit_usd.description: The spending-policy limit the decision was checked against, when a POLICY event. Note: this is a single limit value, not the full policy envelope; action-ref-v1 scope is derived from the envelope, not read from this field.

replay_fingerprint.description: HMAC fingerprint over the canonicalized (resource_url, pay_to, amount, currency, deadline) tuple, when recorded.

error_message.description: Truncated, PII-safe failure message, when event_type is an error/blocked outcome.

prev_entry_hmac.description: HMAC-SHA256 of the previous entry's canonical JSON (the chain link). null for the first entry in a process-scoped chain. The whole entry — not a field subset — is the HMAC content.
